message:
feat(runtime): add allocation budget tracking and enhance subsystem integration

Additional enhancements to runtime subsystems for better observability
and integration across components.

allocation_budget.rs:
- Add BudgetConfig for configurable allocation limits
- Implement BudgetAlert for threshold notifications
- Add BudgetEvidence for decision auditing
- Support per-frame allocation tracking
- Add cumulative budget summary reporting

bocpd.rs enhancements:
- Add run-length distribution export for debugging
- Implement changepoint probability smoothing
- Add regime transition callbacks
- Support custom hazard functions
- Add serialization for state persistence

resize_coalescer.rs additions:
- Integrate allocation budget checks during resize
- Add coalescer state export for telemetry
- Support manual regime override for testing
- Improve decision logging detail

terminal_writer.rs enhancements:
- Add diff strategy decision logging
- Support strategy override for debugging
- Add render timing hooks for VOI integration
- Improve invalidation tracking granularity

evidence_sink.rs additions:
- Add batch evidence collection
- Support evidence filtering by subsystem
- Add timestamp correlation for cross-subsystem analysis

These enhancements improve debuggability and enable better integration
testing of the adaptive subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
